macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Nears $80,000 Amid Surging Institutional Demand
items.summary: Bitcoin traded between $76,960 and $78,663 in the past 24 hours, reaching $78,105 (up 0.86%) as institutional demand drives prices higher, testing $80,000 levels.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Dips 0.6% to $2.59 Trillion, Zcash Leads Gains
items.summary: Overall cryptocurrency market capitalization fell 0.6% to $2.59 trillion in the past 24 hours, with Zcash surging 9.1% while the market awaits signals from stock markets.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Exceed $118 Million, Longs Hit Hardest
items.summary: Futures liquidations surged past $118 million in the last 24 hours, primarily affecting long positions in Bitcoin ($60M, 57.86% longs), Ethereum ($54M, 74.64% longs), and Solana ($4M, 79% longs).

items.title: Strategy Executes Third-Largest Bitcoin Purchase, Holdings Reach 815,061 BTC
items.summary: Strategy made its third-largest Bitcoin purchase to date using stock sales, boosting holdings to 815,061 BTC at an average price of $75,527, with shares up 25% in the past month.

items.title: Bitmine Immersion Boosts Ether Treasury to 4.97 Million ETH
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies added to its Ether holdings, now at 4.97 million ETH (nearly two-thirds staked, generating $221M annual revenue), amid expectations of an ETH recovery.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Yann LeCun's Lab Releases Leham, a Breakthrough JEPA Implementation for World Models
items.summary: Yann LeCun's lab unveiled Leham, a working implementation of Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) that addresses longstanding issues in world model research. It trains in hours on one GPU, achieves 48 times faster planning, and removes five previously essential loss terms.[1]
items.source: YouTube - Yann LeCun Said LLMs Will Never Understand the World

items.title: Google Launches New AI Professional Certificate for Beginners
items.summary: Google introduced a brand new AI Professional Certificate aimed at students, freshers, and AI explorers, providing a complete one-shot course for beginners.[4]
items.source: YouTube - Google's Complete One-Shot AI Course For Beginners

items.title: Andrej Karpathy Releases Auto-Research Git Repository for LM Optimization
items.summary: Andrej Karpathy launched a Git repository featuring a script that large models (LMs) should optimize, sparking discussions on trusting auto-research tools blindly.[2]
items.source: YouTube - Can you Trust Auto-Research Blindly?

items.title: Thiel Fellows Spotlight AI for Fraud Detection and Recruitment
items.summary: New Thiel Fellows include Alex Shieh of The Antifraud Company, using AI models and open-source intelligence to detect government fraud, and discussions on AI agents like Juicebox for targeted job recruitment.[3]
items.source: YouTube - Meet the New Thiel Fellows

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake 'Rynx' Officially Announced for July 9 Launch on PC
items.summary: The remake of Assassin's Creed Black Flag, titled Rynx, is set to launch on July 9, including on PC, marking a return for one of the best-rated pirate games.

items.title: FlyQuest Co-Streaming Controversy Ignites League of Legends Esports Community
items.summary: FlyQuest's co-streaming approach has sparked major backlash and debate in the League of Legends esports scene, setting the community on fire as discussed on Power Spike.

items.title: Positive Sales Update for Nintendo Switch 2 Games Including Pokopia and Upcoming Titles
items.summary: Pokopia tops Nintendo charts and sells out at GameStop, with strong performance for Pokemon Legends ZA; pre-orders live for Switch 2 titles like DRAGON QUEST I & II HD-2D Remake, EA SPORTS FC 26, and others.

items.title: Resident Evil Requiem Dominates Sales Charts Among Series Entries
items.summary: Resident Evil's latest title, Requiem, achieves one of the highest sales rankings in the franchise's history.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
